title: Minimum Size Subarray Sum
description: Return the minimum length of a contiguous subarray of `nums` whose sum is greater than or equal to `target`. If no subarray works, return `0`.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Minimum threshold that the subarray sum must reach.

parameters.name: nums
parameters.description: Array of positive integers in which you need to find a contiguous window.

returns.description: The minimum length of a valid window, or `0` if none exists.

examples.title: Example 1
examples.explanation: The window `[4, 3]` reaches `7` with the minimum length.
